
func (s *Server) handlePageOldRouteGET(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	p := testapp.PageOldRoute{
	App: s.app,
}
	body, redirect, redirectStatus, err := p.GET(r)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling PageOldRoute.GET", err)
		return
	}
	if httpRedirect(w, r, redirect, redirectStatus) {
		return
	}
	genericHead := s.app.Head(r)

	bodyAttrs := func(w http.ResponseWriter) {
		writeBodyAttrOnVisibilityChange(w)
	}

	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, genericHead, nil, body, bodyAttrs,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering PageOldRoute", err)
		return
	}
}
